name: World War Toons: Tank Arena VR (Trial Version)

reviews.review_title: A great challenge that can be the benchm
reviews.review_description:
As a user who enjoys World of War Tank FPS, it is a great change-up platform challenge for those who have been waiting for Tank VR FPS.
In addition, the interior finish and interactive features such as the Panzer Sherman Tank used in World War II are fantastic.
However, it is not easy because the control is not familiar in the part where you have to move in the air with a VR controller. (It would be great to have a dedicated joystick.)
I was quite worried about motion sickness due to the nature of VR, but I hardly felt motion sickness because of the movement inside the cockpit.
The feeling of hitting, which is an essential point of FPS, seems to be still a part to be corrected. (I felt light)
In the multi-part, the confrontation between the environment object and the user is still awkward, but if the user participation rate increases over time, it will be resolved through the report.
The part that I was very happy with is that it can be thought of as creating another VR category.
I will try to enjoy it without any burden until the official launch and evaluate it again.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing WWT:TA VR. We're very happy that you enjoyed our game.
And we're trying to fix those problems you mentioned before the product is finally released.
Thank you again and hope to see you in the battlefield next time.

reviews.review_description:
This is by far the best tank game on the quest 2 at the moment!

If you want to feel the power of a tank from inside the cockpit, there is no other place to look but here.

However, please make navigating the menu to be smoother and more refined and just allow us to point and click in the menu instead of the current system of hovering your hand over a button for it to finally give you an option to select it.

Also, please add an offline mode, campaign, and co-op with friends and this will be a dream come true.

This game has much potential. A well deserved 5 stars for what is being offered currently. Let’s just hope the devs keep up the good work :)

Its a perfect little funny tank action game.
It has everything for a little multiplayer fun.
Except its hard to creat/ join a match.
It randomly take you into one if there is an online player.
Please fix the multiplayer match making.
I would pay for the game 15$ for sure!
Keep it in development.
Supposed to be released 2 days ago in store but not yet available. Beta was fun, pretty simple but does that very well. This is the kind of games the Q was made for.
I like this tank game but it lacks something. That would be perfect if Dev team can make the unique story mode for this game.

developer_response.body:
Hi MajorAlpha, 
thank you for your review. Happy to hear that you like this game. I think it's a great idea to add a unique story mode. I will deliver your message to the Dev team and see if we can have something like this as part of our game. It may take some time to come to fruition, but we will do our best to deliver what our Commanders want. Thank you once again for your review and feedback. 
Oh, and if you haven't already done so, join our Discord and get all the updates and info. https://discord.gg/tankarenavr

reviews.review_description:
I've purchased other Tank Battle games hoping they would be THIS GAME and they failed but this game is the GAME I WAS LOOKING FOR!  In other tank games, you are standing there like in an arcade watching and playing from outside an arcade game.  

This game PUTS you IN the tank!  I LOVE IT.  It's not perfect but it is getting there. Driving the tanks is still a little loose but once tightened up it will be GREAT!  

I would like to see a single player against A.I.s.  The practice area is cool, but I'd like to see an actual solo game in all the different locations. 

I will definitely buy this game when it becomes available as a finished game!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for playing WWT:TA VR and we're greatly excited that you loved it. We’re tightening it up to make it better!

reviews.review_title: OK Casual Tank Shooter, Good mechanics
reviews.review_description:
My video beta impressions review: https://youtu.be/TSk0p6145ho

Good casual shooter overall. UI interaction with the hand is beyond my understanding, but the gameplay was fun, tank movement, reloading, fix, shooting and skill mechanics are well made. Cosmetics is meh, end game progressions screen lacks interaction. Visuals aren't great but I don't expect it to be running on the Quest 2. Overall, worth trying the free beta, but looking for improvements to take a it a notch up, it needs it.
Every time I load in it just says.Version unavailable check back later.it was fun when you could play it

developer_response.body:
Hello NolcarVR, 
Previously, our game was only on applab for beta testing and after the testing was finished, we had taken the game down. So, when you had tried our game, we did not have the game up and running. However, we decided to reload it back on applab, so everyone could experience it and enjoy our game. We hope you return to the battlefield and tell us about your experience.

reviews.review_description: When it was still playable it was fun but now its broken:(

developer_response.body:
Hello AcidSnake12000, 
Previously, our game was only on applab for beta testing and after the testing was finished, we had taken the game down. It was not broken as you had thought. However, we decided to run it back on applab, so everyone could experience it and enjoy our game. We hope you return to the battlefield and tell us about your experience.

reviews.review_description: A realistic and strategic take on tank battles. Group matching provides a fun teamwork experience. I would love to see more tanks in the full version!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your 5 star review! We have plans to release more tanks in the future, so getting the full version would definitely be a plus. Either way, the game is fun to play with any tank, so I hope to see you sharpen your skills and on the battlefield!

reviews.review_description: I didn't know there would be a trial version, but I don't think it would be bad if I played the game first with this feature and moved on to the main game. I don't think this game is bad.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. The whole point was so people can experience our game and decide if they want to upgrade the game. Nonetheless, you can choose to keep playing in the free version if you so desire. Once again, we appreciate your review!

reviews.review_description: I got it  just for it to kick me out and say this version of the game ain't available so yeah no

developer_response.body:
Hello SentinelWIf,
I'm sorry for your experience with our game, but many things have changed since the last time you tried our game. For one, our game was up and running on applab for beta testing so when you had returned, it was down from the server, and we were no longer running the game from applab. However, we did an update, and now we have released the game to the public for free, so you can now return and give us another shot. Hope you return to the battlefield and enjoy the new gameplay!

reviews.review_description:
Other than the game graphics being somewhat cartoonish, I absolutely loved the gameplay. Pather tank was ok but the Tiger tank was just a beast! Getting to know the tanks and it’s special skills is the key to victory. 

AI bots were a little slow, so I think if they had difficulty modes for AIs, it would totally be fun and challenging. I got to play against players at level 300 and it was so challenging and rewarding when getting the win against them. 

You just need to get the hang of the gameplay and you’ll fall in love with the game like I did.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive 5 star review. Glad to hear that you enjoy the game and you're getting to know the tanks. I would love to see you on the battlefield. As for the AI, we are working on an update to fix that. Please be patient and we will deliver as many requested already. Happy gaming!

reviews.review_title: A Rollercoaster Ride of Tank Mayhem
reviews.review_description: This game is a rollercoaster ride that's undeniably fun, but falls just short of being a true masterpiece. The exhilarating gameplay and the novelty of operating a tank in VR make it a must-try experience, but the absence of a growth element leaves you with a lingering sense of unfulfilled potential.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review and feedback. I'm glad you find it fun. 
We do admit that we have room for growth. We will do our best to fulfill your lingering sense.

I load in just to see "version missmatch" and it can't update can someone help?
So It’s a good game but sometimes it says I’m on the wrong version and it keeps disconnecting me from the game

First of all I love this game I love the graphics the carpet for little fire hydrant for one last of catches on fire I’m able to put it out and actually keep going x-rays or fire hydrant save me the all around the game is a good game although I would like to see the co-op with friends  multiplayer also do you know a nice little campaign wouldn’t be bad against ai tanks and hmvs 
Definitely need to add the joystick control instead of using your arm to leave it in the air I think that’s what keeps me from taking a break sometimes I feel like I would play a lot longer if I have the joystick control
